name: Average resolution time trend (last 14 days)
sql: SELECT CAST(resolved_at AS DATE) AS day_bucket, ROUND(AVG(DATEDIFF('HOUR', created_at, resolved_at)), 1) AS avg_resolution_hours FROM tickets WHERE resolved_at IS NOT NULL AND resolved_at >= DATEADD('DAY', -14, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) GROUP BY CAST(resolved_at AS DATE) ORDER BY day_bucket
